violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding was not functioning adequately. Cooler with the toaster/pizza oven on top noted above 41 degrees F.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. Kitchen area should have a sanitizer bucket set up to sanitize food prep surfaces.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Small condiment coolers noted with no thermometer. Some coolers noted with thermometers not in conspicuously placed.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food prep area.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers in the kitchen area noted in need of cleaning.
